2// Name: mathplot.cpp
3// Purpose: Framework for plotting in wxWindows

7// Oskar Waldemarsson (for multi Y axis and corrections)

14#ifndef MATHPLOT_H_INCLUDED
15#define MATHPLOT_H_INCLUDED

81// mathplot_EXPORTS definition uses windows dll to export function.
82// mathplot_EXPORTS will be defined by cmake
83#ifdef mathplot_EXPORTS
85 #define WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT WXEXPORT
87 #define WXDLLIMPEXP_DATA_MATHPLOT(type) WXEXPORT type
88#else // not making DLL
90 #define WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT
92 #define WXDLLIMPEXP_DATA_MATHPLOT(type) type
93#endif
94
95#if defined(__GNUG__) && !defined(__APPLE__) && !defined(__INTEL_CLANG_COMPILER)
96 #pragma interface "mathplot.h"
97#endif
98
99#include <cassert> // For assert debug message (assert is disabled if NDEBUG is defined)
100#include <vector>
101#include <map>
102#include <unordered_map>
103
111// Multiple define to compile with C++14 because
112// Optional is only for C++ >= 17
113// Structured binding is a C++17 feature
114#if (defined(__cplusplus) && (__cplusplus > 201402L)) // C++17 or newer
115 // Use optional
116 #include <optional>
118 typedef std::optional<unsigned int> mpOptional_uint;
120 typedef std::optional<int> mpOptional_int;
122 #define MP_OPTNULL_INT std::nullopt
124 #define MP_OPTTEST(opt) (opt)
126 #define MP_OPTGET(opt) (*opt)
127 // Use structured binding
129 #define MP_LOOP_ITER auto& [m_yID, m_yData]
130#else
131 // To replace optional int...
133 typedef unsigned int mpOptional_uint;
135 typedef int mpOptional_int;
137 #define MP_OPTNULL_INT -1
139 #define MP_OPTTEST(opt) ((opt) != -1)
141 #define MP_OPTGET(opt) (opt)
142 // To replace structured binding...
144 #define MP_LOOP_ITER auto& elem
146 #define m_yID elem.first
148 #define m_yData elem.second
149#endif
150

215
217#define MP_EPSILON 1e-30
219#define MP_ISNOTNULL(x) (std::fpclassify(x) != FP_ZERO)

222#define MP_EXTRA_MARGIN 8

269struct mpRect
270{
271 union {
272 struct
273 {
274 wxCoord startPx;
275 wxCoord startPy;
276 wxCoord endPx;
277 wxCoord endPy;
278 };
279 struct
280 {
281 wxCoord left;
282 wxCoord top;
283 wxCoord right;
284 wxCoord bottom;
285 };
286 struct
287 {
288 wxCoord x1;
289 wxCoord y1;
290 wxCoord x2;
291 wxCoord y2;
292 };
293 wxCoord tab[4];
294 };
299 wxRect GetRect(void)
300 {
301 return wxRect(startPx, startPy, endPx - startPx, endPy - startPy);
302 }
303};
304static_assert(sizeof(mpRect) == 4 * sizeof(wxCoord));
305
311template<typename T>
312struct mpRange
313{
314 T min = 0;
315 T max = 0;
316
318 mpRange()
319 {
320 min = 0;
321 max = 0;
322 }
323
325 mpRange(T value1, T value2)
326 {
327 if (value1 < value2)
328 {
329 min = value1;
330 max = value2;
331 }
332 else
333 {
334 min = value2;
335 max = value1;
336 }
337 }
338
340 void Set(T _value)
341 {
342 min = _value;
343 max = _value;
344 }
345
347 void Set(T _min, T _max)
348 {
349 min = _min;
350 max = _max;
351 }
352
354 void SetMin(T _min)
355 {
356 min = _min;
357 if (max < min)
358 max = min;
359 }
360
362 void SetMax(T _max)
363 {
364 max = _max;
365 if (min > max)
366 min = max;
367 }
368
370 void Assign(T value1, T value2)
371 {
372 if (value1 < value2)
373 {
374 min = value1;
375 max = value2;
376 }
377 else
378 {
379 min = value2;
380 max = value1;
381 }
382 }
383
385 bool IsSet()
386 {
387 return ((min != 0) || (max != 0));
388 }
389
394 void Update(T value)
395 {
396 if (value < min)
397 min = value;
398 else
399 if (value > max)
400 max = value;
401 }
402
406 void Update(T _min, T _max)
407 {
408 if (_min < min)
409 min = _min;
410 if (_max > max)
411 max = _max;
412 }
413
416 void Update(mpRange range)
417 {
418 if (range.min < min)
419 min = range.min;
420 if (range.max > max)
421 max = range.max;
422 }
423
425 void Check(void)
426 {
427 if (min == max)
428 {
429 if (max > 0)
430 min = 0;
431 else
432 max = 0;
433 }
434 }
435
437 T Length(void) const
438 {
439 return max - min;
440 }
441
443 T GetCenter(void) const
444 {
445 return (min + max) / 2;
446 }
447
449 T GetMaxAbs(void) const
450 {
451 return std::max(fabs(min), fabs(max));
452 }
453
455 void ToLog(void)
456 {
457 min = (min > 0) ? log10(min) : 0;
458 max = (max > 0) ? log10(max) : 0;
459 }
460
462 bool PointIsInside(T point) const
463 {
464 return ((point >= min) && (point <= max));
465 }
466
467 #if (defined(__cplusplus) && (__cplusplus > 201703L)) // C++20 or newer
468 bool operator==(const mpRange&) const = default;
469 #else
471 bool operator==(const mpRange &other) const
472 {
473 return (min == other.min) && (max == other.max);
474 }
476 bool operator!=(const mpRange& other) const
477 {
478 return !(*this == other);
479 }
480 #endif
481};
482
488struct [[deprecated("Deprecated! No longer used as X and Y are now separated")]] mpFloatRect
489{
490 mpRange<double> x;
491 std::vector<mpRange<double>> y;
492
499 mpFloatRect(mpWindow& w);
500
502 mpFloatRect() = delete;
503
510 bool PointIsInside(double px, double py, size_t yAxisID = 0) const {
511 if (yAxisID < y.size())
512 {
513 if( (px < x.min || px > x.max) ||
514 (py < y[yAxisID].min || py > y[yAxisID].max))
515 {
516 return false;
517 }
518 }
519 else
520 {
521 return false;
522 }
523
524 return true;
525 }
526
533 void UpdateBoundingBoxToInclude(double px, double py, size_t yAxisID = 0) {
534 assert(yAxisID < y.size());
535 if (yAxisID < y.size())
536 {
537 if (px < x.min ) x.min = px;
538 else if (px > x.max ) x.max = px;
539 if (py < y[yAxisID].min ) y[yAxisID].min = py;
540 else if (py > y[yAxisID].max ) y[yAxisID].max = py;
541 }
542 }
543
550 void InitializeBoundingBox(double px, double py, size_t yAxisID = 0) {
551 assert(yAxisID < y.size());
552 if (yAxisID < y.size())
553 {
554 x.min = x.max = px;
555 y[yAxisID].min = y[yAxisID].max = py;
556 }
557 }
559 bool IsNotSet(mpWindow& w) const { const mpFloatRect def(w); return *this==def; }
561#if (defined(__cplusplus) && (__cplusplus > 201703L)) // C++ > C++17 (MSVC requires <AdditionalOptions>/Zc:__cplusplus</AdditionalOptions>
562 bool operator==(const mpFloatRect&) const = default;
563#else
564 // We compare with an epsilon precision
565 // NOTE: should be unnecessary as we are looking for any changes; normally this will be an exact match or a real change...
566 bool operator==(const mpFloatRect& rect) const
567 {
568 auto Same = [](double a, double b) {
569 return std::fabs(a - b) < MP_EPSILON;
570 };
571
572 // Compare scalar members
573 if (!Same(x.min, rect.x.min) || !Same(x.max, rect.x.max))
574 {
575 return false;
576 }
577
578 // Compare vector sizes
579 if (y.size() != rect.y.size())
580 {
581 return false;
582 }
583
584 // Compare each Y boundary
585 for (size_t i = 0; i < y.size(); ++i)
586 {
587 if (!Same(y[i].min, rect.y[i].min) ||
588 !Same(y[i].max, rect.y[i].max) )
589 {
590 return false;
591 }
592 }
593
594 return true;
595 }
596#endif
597};
598
604struct mpFloatRectSimple
605{
606 mpRange<double> x;
607 mpRange<double> y;
608
614 mpFloatRectSimple(mpRange<double> _x, mpRange<double> _y) : x(_x), y(_y) { };
615
621 bool PointIsInside(double px, double py) const {
622 return x.PointIsInside(px) && y.PointIsInside(py);
623 }
624
630 void UpdateBoundingBoxToInclude(double px, double py)
631 {
632 x.Update(px);
633 y.Update(py);
634 }
635
640 void InitializeBoundingBox(double px, double py)
641 {
642 x.Set(px, px);
643 y.Set(py, py);
644 }
645};

661 mpID_CONFIG,

664 mpID_HELP_MOUSE,
665 mpID_FULLSCREEN

879class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpLayer: public wxObject
880{
881 public:
886 mpLayer(mpLayerType layerType);
887
888 virtual ~mpLayer()
889 {
890 ;
891 }
892
895 void SetWindow(mpWindow &w)
896 {
897 m_win = &w;
898 }
899
907 virtual bool HasBBox()
908 {
909 return true;
910 }
911
915 mpLayerType GetLayerType() const
916 {
917 return m_type;
918 }
919
923 int GetLayerSubType() const
924 {
925 return m_subtype;
926 }
927
933 virtual bool IsLayerType(mpLayerType typeOfInterest, int *subtype)
934 {
935 *subtype = m_subtype;
936 return (m_type == typeOfInterest);
937 }
938
942 virtual double GetMinX()
943 {
944 return -1.0;
945 }
946
950 virtual double GetMaxX()
951 {
952 return 1.0;
953 }
954
958 virtual double GetMinY()
959 {
960 return -1.0;
961 }
962
966 virtual double GetMaxY()
967 {
968 return 1.0;
969 }
970
1012 void Plot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
1013
1017 void SetName(const wxString &name)
1018 {
1019 m_name = name;
1020 }
1021
1025 const wxString& GetName() const
1026 {
1027 return m_name;
1028 }
1029
1033 void SetFont(const wxFont &font)
1034 {
1035 m_font = font;
1036 }
1037
1041 const wxFont& GetFont() const
1042 {
1043 return m_font;
1044 }
1045
1049 void SetFontColour(const wxColour &colour)
1050 {
1051 m_fontcolour = colour;
1052 }
1053
1057 const wxColour& GetFontColour() const
1058 {
1059 return m_fontcolour;
1060 }
1061
1065 void SetPen(const wxPen &pen)
1066 {
1067 m_pen = pen;
1068 }
1069
1073 const wxPen& GetPen() const
1074 {
1075 return m_pen;
1076 }
1077
1080 void SetBrush(const wxBrush &brush)
1081 {
1082 if (brush == wxNullBrush)
1083 m_brush = *wxTRANSPARENT_BRUSH;
1084 else
1085 m_brush = brush;
1086 }
1087
1091 void SetBrush(const wxColour &colour, enum wxBrushStyle style = wxBRUSHSTYLE_SOLID)
1092 {
1093 m_brush.SetColour(colour);
1094 m_brush.SetStyle(style);
1095 }
1096
1099 const wxBrush& GetBrush() const
1100 {
1101 return m_brush;
1102 }
1103
1106 void SetShowName(bool show)
1107 {
1108 m_showName = show;
1109 }
1110
1113 inline bool GetShowName() const
1114 {
1115 return m_showName;
1116 }
1117
1120 void SetDrawOutsideMargins(bool drawModeOutside)
1121 {
1122 m_drawOutsideMargins = drawModeOutside;
1123 }
1124
1127 bool GetDrawOutsideMargins() const
1128 {
1129 return m_drawOutsideMargins;
1130 }
1131
1136 wxBitmap GetColourSquare(int side = 16);
1137
1140 inline bool IsVisible() const
1141 {
1142 return m_visible;
1143 }
1144
1147 virtual void SetVisible(bool show)
1148 {
1149 m_visible = show;
1150 }
1151
1154 inline bool IsTractable() const
1155 {
1156 return m_tractable;
1157 }
1158
1161 virtual void SetTractable(bool track)
1162 {
1163 m_tractable = track;
1164 }
1165
1168 void SetAlign(int align)
1169 {
1170 m_flags = align;
1171 }
1172
1175 int GetAlign() const
1176 {
1177 return m_flags;
1178 }
1179
1182 void SetCanDelete(bool canDelete)
1183 {
1184 m_CanDelete = canDelete;
1185 }
1186
1189 bool GetCanDelete(void) const
1190 {
1191 return m_CanDelete;
1192 }
1193
1196 mpLayerZOrder GetZIndex(void) const
1197 {
1198 return m_ZIndex;
1199 }
1200
1201 protected:
1202 const mpLayerType m_type;
1203 mpWindow* m_win;
1204 int m_subtype;
1205 wxFont m_font;
1206 wxColour m_fontcolour;
1207 wxPen m_pen;
1208 wxBrush m_brush;
1209 wxString m_name;
1210 bool m_showName;
1211 bool m_drawOutsideMargins;
1212 bool m_visible;
1213 bool m_tractable;
1214 int m_flags;
1215 mpRect m_plotBoundaries;
1216 bool m_CanDelete;
1217 mpLayerZOrder m_ZIndex;
1218
1221 void UpdateContext(wxDC &dc) const;
1222
1227 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w) = 0;
1228
1233 virtual bool DoBeforePlot()
1234 {
1235 return true;
1236 }
1237
1244 void CheckLog(double *x, double *y, int yAxisID);
1245
1246 private:
1247 bool m_busy;
1248 mpLayer() = delete; // default ctor not implemented/permitted
1249
1250 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpLayer);
1251};

1262class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpInfoLayer: public mpLayer
1263{
1264 public:
1266 mpInfoLayer();
1267
1272 mpInfoLayer(wxPoint pos, const wxBrush &brush = *wxTRANSPARENT_BRUSH, mpLocation location = mpMarginUser);
1273
1275 virtual ~mpInfoLayer();
1276
1279 virtual void SetVisible(bool show);
1280
1285 virtual void UpdateInfo(mpWindow &w, wxEvent &event);
1286
1289 virtual bool HasBBox()
1290 {
1291 return false;
1292 }
1293
1296 [[deprecated("Use Show() instead")]]
1297 virtual void ErasePlot(wxDC&, mpWindow&) {};
1298
1302 virtual bool Inside(const wxPoint &point);
1303
1307 virtual void Move(wxPoint delta, mpWindow &w);
1308
1310 virtual void UpdateReference();
1311
1314 wxPoint GetPosition() const
1315 {
1316 return m_dim.GetPosition();
1317 }
1318
1321 void SetInitialPosition(wxPoint pos)
1322 {
1323 m_relX = pos.x / 100.0;
1324 m_relY = pos.y / 100.0;
1325 }
1326
1329 wxSize GetSize() const
1330 {
1331 return m_dim.GetSize();
1332 }
1333
1336 const wxRect& GetRectangle() const
1337 {
1338 return m_dim;
1339 }
1340
1343 void SetLocation(mpLocation location)
1344 {
1345 m_location = location;
1346 }
1347
1350 mpLocation GetLocation() const
1351 {
1352 return m_location;
1353 }
1354
1355 protected:
1356 wxRect m_dim;
1357 wxBitmap* m_info_bmp;
1358 wxPoint m_reference;
1359 double m_relX;
1360 double m_relY;
1361 mpLocation m_location;
1362
1367 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
1368
1371 void SetInfoRectangle(mpWindow &w, int width = 0, int height = 0);
1372
1373 private:
1374 double clamp(double v, double min, double max);
1375
1376 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpInfoLayer);
1377};

1383class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpInfoCoords: public mpInfoLayer
1384{
1385 public:
1387 mpInfoCoords();
1388
1390 mpInfoCoords(mpLocation location);
1391
1396 mpInfoCoords(wxPoint pos, const wxBrush &brush = *wxTRANSPARENT_BRUSH, mpLocation location = mpMarginUser);
1397
1399 ~mpInfoCoords()
1400 {
1401 ;
1402 }
1403
1407 virtual void UpdateInfo(mpWindow &w, wxEvent &event);
1408
1411 [[deprecated("Use Show() instead")]]
1412 virtual void ErasePlot(wxDC&, mpWindow&) {};
1413
1416 void Show(bool show)
1417 {
1418 m_show = show;
1419 }
1420
1423 bool IsShown()
1424 {
1425 return m_show;
1426 }
1427
1432 bool ShouldBeShown(wxRect plotArea, wxPoint mousePos)
1433 {
1434 return IsVisible() && (GetDrawOutsideMargins() || plotArea.Contains(mousePos));
1435 }
1436
1440 void SetLabelMode(mpLabelType mode, unsigned int time_conv = MP_X_RAWTIME)
1441 {
1442 m_labelType = mode;
1443 m_timeConv = time_conv;
1444 }
1445
1448 void SetSeriesCoord(bool show)
1449 {
1450 m_series_coord = show;
1451 }
1452
1455 bool IsSeriesCoord() const
1456 {
1457 return m_series_coord;
1458 }
1459
1465 virtual wxString GetInfoCoordsText(mpWindow &w, double xVal, std::unordered_map<int, double> yValList);
1466
1469 void SetPenSeries(const wxPen &pen)
1470 {
1471 m_penSeries = pen;
1472 }
1473
1477 void DrawContent(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
1478
1479 protected:
1480 bool m_show;
1481 wxString m_content;
1482 mpLabelType m_labelType;
1483 unsigned int m_timeConv;
1484 wxCoord m_mouseX;
1485 wxCoord m_mouseY;
1486 bool m_series_coord;
1487 wxPen m_penSeries;
1488
1493 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
1494
1495 private:
1496 std::unordered_map<int, double> m_yValList;
1497
1498 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpInfoCoords);
1499};

1505class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpInfoLegend: public mpInfoLayer
1506{
1507 public:
1509 mpInfoLegend();
1510
1516 mpInfoLegend(wxPoint pos, const wxBrush &brush = *wxWHITE_BRUSH, mpLocation location = mpMarginUser);
1517
1519 ~mpInfoLegend() {}
1520
1523 void SetItemMode(mpLegendStyle mode)
1524 {
1525 m_item_mode = mode;
1526 m_needs_update = true;
1527 }
1528
1530 mpLegendStyle GetItemMode() const
1531 {
1532 return m_item_mode;
1533 }
1534
1537 void SetItemDirection(mpLegendDirection mode)
1538 {
1539 m_item_direction = mode;
1540 m_needs_update = true;
1541 }
1542
1544 mpLegendDirection GetItemDirection() const
1545 {
1546 return m_item_direction;
1547 }
1548
1550 void SetNeedUpdate()
1551 {
1552 m_needs_update = true;
1553 }
1554
1557 void ShowDraggedSeries(bool active)
1558 {
1559 m_showDraggedSeries = active;
1560 }
1561
1564 bool IsDraggedSeriesShown() const
1565 {
1566 return m_showDraggedSeries;
1567 }
1568
1574 int GetLegendHitRegion(wxPoint mousePos);
1575
1582 void DrawDraggedSeries(wxDC& dc, mpWindow &w);
1583
1587 void DrawContent(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
1588
1591 void RestoreAxisHighlighting(mpWindow &w);
1592
1594 enum HitCode : int
1595 {
1596 HitNone = -1,
1597 HitHeader = -2
1598 };
1599
1600 mpFunction* m_selectedSeries = nullptr;
1601 mpOptional_int m_lastHoveredAxisID = MP_OPTNULL_INT;
1602
1603 protected:
1604 mpLegendStyle m_item_mode;
1605 mpLegendDirection m_item_direction;
1606 bool m_showDraggedSeries;
1607 wxString m_headerString = wxString::FromUTF8("≡");
1608
1613 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
1614
1615 private:
1617 struct LegendDetail
1618 {
1619 unsigned int layerIdx;
1620 wxCoord legendEnd;
1622 };
1623 std::vector<LegendDetail> m_LegendDetailList;
1624 wxCoord m_headerEnd;
1625 bool m_needs_update;
1636 void UpdateBitmap(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
1637
1638 private:
1639 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpInfoLegend);
1640};

1642//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1643// mpLayer implementations - functions
1644//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1645
1646
1653class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpFunction: public mpLayer
1654{
1655 public:
1661 mpFunction(mpLayerType layerType = mpLAYER_PLOT, const wxString &name = wxEmptyString, unsigned int yAxisID = 0);
1662
1666 void SetContinuity(bool continuity)
1667 {
1668 m_continuous = continuity;
1669 }
1670
1674 bool GetContinuity() const
1675 {
1676 return m_continuous;
1677 }
1678
1681 void SetStep(unsigned int step)
1682 {
1683 m_step = step;
1684 }
1685
1688 unsigned int GetStep() const
1689 {
1690 return m_step;
1691 }
1692
1695 void SetSymbol(mpSymbol symbol)
1696 {
1697 m_symbol = symbol;
1698 }
1699
1702 mpSymbol GetSymbol() const
1703 {
1704 return m_symbol;
1705 }
1706
1709 void SetSymbolSize(int size)
1710 {
1711 m_symbolSize = size;
1712 }
1713
1716 int GetSymbolSize() const
1717 {
1718 return m_symbolSize;
1719 }
1720
1724 virtual bool DrawSymbol(wxDC &dc, wxCoord x, wxCoord y);
1725
1729 int GetYAxisID() const
1730 {
1731 return m_yAxisID;
1732 }
1733
1738 void SetYAxisID(unsigned int yAxisID)
1739 {
1740 m_yAxisID = yAxisID;
1741 }
1742
1746 void SetLegendIsAlwaysVisible(bool alwaysVisible)
1747 {
1748 m_LegendIsAlwaysVisible = alwaysVisible;
1749 }
1750
1754 bool GetLegendIsAlwaysVisible() const
1755 {
1756 return m_LegendIsAlwaysVisible;
1757 }
1758
1762 void SetAutoStep(bool enable)
1763 {
1764 m_autoStep = enable;
1765 }
1766
1769 bool GetAutoStep() const
1770 {
1771 return m_autoStep;
1772 }
1773
1777 void SetMaxNOfPoints(size_t nOfPoints)
1778 {
1779 m_maxNOfPoints = nOfPoints;
1780 }
1781
1784 size_t GetMaxNOfPoints() const
1785 {
1786 return m_maxNOfPoints;
1787 }
1788
1789 protected:
1790 bool m_continuous;
1791 mpSymbol m_symbol;
1792 int m_symbolSize;
1793 unsigned int m_step;
1794 int m_yAxisID;
1795 bool m_LegendIsAlwaysVisible;
1796 bool m_autoStep;
1797 size_t m_maxNOfPoints;
1798
1799 private:
1800 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpFunction);
1801};

1805class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpLine: public mpFunction
1806{
1807 public:
1814 mpLine(double value, const wxPen &pen = *wxGREEN_PEN);
1815

1817 virtual bool HasBBox() override
1818 {
1819 return false;
1820 }
1821
1825 double GetValue() const
1826 {
1827 return m_value;
1828 }
1829
1833 void SetValue(const double value)
1834 {
1835 m_value = value;
1836 }
1837
1841 bool IsHorizontal(void) const
1842 {
1843 return m_IsHorizontal;
1844 }
1845
1846 protected:
1847 double m_value;
1848 bool m_IsHorizontal;
1849
1850 private:
1851 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpLine);
1852};

1874

1878

1914 }

2053class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpFXY: public mpFunction
2054{
2055 public:
2061 mpFXY(const wxString &name = wxEmptyString, int flags = mpALIGN_SW, bool viewAsBar = false, unsigned int yAxisID = 0);
2062
2066 virtual void Rewind() = 0;
2067
2071 virtual void Clear()
2072 {
2073 ;
2074 }
2075
2079 virtual int GetSize()
2080 {
2081 return 0;
2082 }
2083
2090 virtual bool GetNextXY(double *x, double *y) = 0;
2091
2098 bool DoGetNextXY(double *x, double *y);
2099
2104 void SetViewMode(bool asBar);
2105
2110 int GetBarWidth(void) const
2111 {
2112 return m_BarWidth;
2113 }
2114
2119 bool ViewAsBar(void) const
2120 {
2121 return m_ViewAsBar;
2122 }
2123
2124 protected:
2125
2126 // Data to calculate label positioning
2127 mpRange<int> m_drawX;
2128 mpRange<int> m_drawY;
2129
2130 // Min delta between 2 x coordinate (used for view as bar)
2131 double m_deltaX;
2132 double m_deltaY;
2133
2134 int m_BarWidth;
2135
2136 bool m_ViewAsBar = false;
2137
2144 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
2145
2150 void UpdateViewBoundary(wxCoord xnew, wxCoord ynew);
2151
2152 private:
2153 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpFXY);
2154};
2155
2156//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2157// mpFXYVector - provided by Jose Luis Blanco
2158//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2159
2179class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpFXYVector: public mpFXY
2180{
2181 public:
2187 mpFXYVector(const wxString &name = wxEmptyString, int flags = mpALIGN_SW, bool viewAsBar = false, unsigned int yAxisID = 0);
2188
2191 virtual ~mpFXYVector()
2192 {
2193 Clear();
2194 }
2195
2200 void SetData(const std::vector<double> &xs, const std::vector<double> &ys);
2201
2205 void Clear() override;
2206
2211 virtual int GetSize() override
2212 {
2213 return m_xs.size();
2214 }
2215
2223 bool AddData(const double x, const double y, bool updatePlot);
2224
2231 void SetReserve(int reserve)
2232 {
2233 m_reserveXY = reserve;
2234 m_xs.reserve(m_reserveXY);
2235 m_ys.reserve(m_reserveXY);
2236 }
2237
2241 int GetReserve() const
2242 {
2243 return m_reserveXY;
2244 }
2245
2246 protected:
2247 std::vector<double> m_xs;
2248 std::vector<double> m_ys;
2249 bool m_isMonotonicX;
2250 int m_reserveXY;
2251 size_t m_index;
2252 size_t m_endIndex;
2253 mpRange<double> m_rangeX;
2254 double m_lastX;
2255 mpRange<double> m_rangeY;
2256 double m_lastY;
2257
2262 virtual void Rewind() override;
2263
2270 virtual bool GetNextXY(double *x, double *y) override;
2271
2276 void DrawAddedPoint(double x, double y);
2277
2280 virtual double GetMinX()override
2281 {
2282 if (m_ViewAsBar)
2283 {
2284 // Make extra space for outer bars
2285 return m_rangeX.min - (m_deltaX / 2);
2286 }
2287 else
2288 {
2289 return m_rangeX.min;
2290 }
2291 }
2292
2295 virtual double GetMinY() override
2296 {
2297 return m_rangeY.min;
2298 }
2299
2302 virtual double GetMaxX() override
2303 {
2304 if(m_ViewAsBar)
2305 {
2306 // Make extra space for outer bars
2307 return m_rangeX.max + (m_deltaX / 2);
2308 }
2309 else
2310 {
2311 return m_rangeX.max;
2312 }
2313 }
2314
2317 virtual double GetMaxY() override
2318 {
2319 return m_rangeY.max;
2320 }
2321
2322 private:
2325 void First_Point(double x, double y);
2326
2329 void Check_Limit(double val, mpRange<double> *range, double *last, double *delta);
2330
2331 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpFXYVector);
2332};
2333
2342class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpProfile: public mpFunction
2343{
2344 public:
2348 mpProfile(const wxString &name = wxEmptyString, int flags = mpALIGN_TOP);
2349
2355 virtual double GetY(double x) = 0;
2356
2357 protected:
2358
2363 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
2364
2365 private:
2366 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpProfile);
2367};
2368
2373class mpFXGeneric: public mpFX
2374{
2375 public:
2380 mpFXGeneric(const wxString &name = wxT("Generic FX function"), int flags = mpALIGN_LEFT, unsigned int yAxisID = 0) :
2381 mpFX(name, flags, yAxisID)
2382 {
2383 wxPen FXpen(*wxBLUE, 1, wxPENSTYLE_SOLID);
2384 SetDrawOutsideMargins(false);
2385 SetContinuity(true);
2386 SetPen(FXpen);
2387 SetStep(8); // Draw one point over eight
2388 }
2389
2394 virtual double GetY(double x)
2395 {
2396 double y;
2397 try
2398 {
2399 y = ComputeY(x);
2400 }
2401 catch (...)
2402 {
2403 y = 0;
2404 }
2405 m_rangeY.Update(y);
2406 return y;
2407 }
2408
2413 virtual double GetMinY()
2414 {
2415 return m_rangeY.min;
2416 }
2417
2422 virtual double GetMaxY()
2423 {
2424 return m_rangeY.max;
2425 }
2426
2427 protected:
2428 mpRange<double> m_rangeY;
2429
2435 virtual double ComputeY(double x) = 0;
2436
2437 private:
2438 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpFXGeneric);
2439};
2440
2445class mpGaussian: public mpFXGeneric
2446{
2447 public:
2453 mpGaussian(double mu, double sigma) :
2454 mpFXGeneric(wxT("Gaussian"), mpALIGN_LEFT)
2455 {
2456 m_mu = mu;
2457 m_sigma = sigma;
2458 m_variance = sigma * sigma;
2459 m_const = 1.0 / sqrt(2.0 * M_PI * m_variance);
2460 }
2461
2462 protected:
2463 double m_mu;
2464 double m_sigma;
2465 double m_variance;
2466 double m_const;
2467
2468 virtual double ComputeY(double x)
2469 {
2470 return m_const * exp(-(x - m_mu) * (x - m_mu) / (2.0 * m_variance));
2471 }
2472
2473 private:
2474 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpGaussian);
2475};
2476
2481class mpNormal: public mpFXGeneric
2482{
2483 public:
2489 mpNormal(double mu, double sigma) :
2490 mpFXGeneric(wxT("Gaussian"), mpALIGN_LEFT)
2491 {
2492 m_mu = mu;
2493 m_sigma = sigma;
2494 m_variance = sigma * sigma;
2495 m_const = 1.0 / (m_variance * sqrt(2.0 * M_PI));
2496 }
2497
2498 protected:
2499 double m_mu;
2500 double m_sigma;
2501 double m_variance;
2502 double m_const;
2503
2504 virtual double ComputeY(double x)
2505 {
2506 if (x < 0)
2507 return 0.0;
2508 else
2509 {
2510 double tmp = log(x) - m_mu;
2511 return m_const * exp(-tmp * tmp / (2.0 * m_variance)) / x;
2512 }
2513 }
2514
2515 private:
2516 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpNormal);
2517};
2518
2519//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2520// mpChart
2521//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2524class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpChart: public mpFunction
2525{
2526 public:
2528 mpChart(const wxString &name = wxEmptyString);
2529
2531 ~mpChart()
2532 {
2533 Clear();
2534 }
2535
2538 void SetChartValues(const std::vector<double> &data);
2539
2542 void SetChartLabels(const std::vector<std::string> &labelArray);
2543
2548 void AddData(const double &data, const std::string &label);
2549
2553 virtual void Clear();
2554
2555 virtual bool HasBBox()
2556 {
2557 return (values.size() > 0);
2558 }
2559
2560 protected:
2561 std::vector<double> values;
2562 std::vector<std::string> labels;
2563
2564 double m_max_value;
2565 double m_total_value;
2566
2567 private:
2568 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpChart);
2569};
2570
2571//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2572// mpBarChart - provided by Jose Davide Rondini
2573//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2574/* Defines for bar charts label positioning. */
2575#define mpBAR_NONE 0
2576#define mpBAR_AXIS_H 1
2577#define mpBAR_AXIS_V 2
2578#define mpBAR_INSIDE 3
2579#define mpBAR_TOP 4
2580
2583class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpBarChart: public mpChart
2584{
2585 public:
2587 mpBarChart(const wxString &name = wxEmptyString, double width = 0.5);
2588
2590 ~mpBarChart()
2591 {
2592 Clear();
2593 }
2594
2596 void SetBarColour(const wxColour &colour);
2597
2599 void SetColumnWidth(const double colWidth)
2600 {
2601 m_width = colWidth;
2602 }
2603
2605 void SetBarLabelPosition(int position);
2606
2610 virtual double GetMinX();
2611
2615 virtual double GetMaxX();
2616
2620 virtual double GetMinY();
2621
2625 virtual double GetMaxY();
2626
2627 protected:
2628
2629 double m_width;
2630 wxColour m_barColour;
2631 int m_labelPos;
2632 double m_labelAngle;
2633
2638 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
2639
2640 private:
2641 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpBarChart);
2642};
2643
2647class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpPieChart: public mpChart
2648{
2649 public:
2653 mpPieChart(const wxString &name = wxEmptyString, double radius = 20);
2654
2656 ~mpPieChart()
2657 {
2658 Clear();
2659 colours.clear();
2660 }
2661
2665 void SetCenter(const wxPoint center)
2666 {
2667 m_center = center;
2668 }
2669
2673 wxPoint GetCenter(void) const
2674 {
2675 return m_center;
2676 }
2677
2681 void SetPieColours(const std::vector<wxColour> &colourArray);
2682
2686 virtual double GetMinX()
2687 {
2688 return m_center.x - m_radius;
2689 }
2690
2694 virtual double GetMaxX()
2695 {
2696 return m_center.x + m_radius;
2697 }
2698
2702 virtual double GetMinY()
2703 {
2704 return m_center.y - m_radius;
2705 }
2706
2710 virtual double GetMaxY()
2711 {
2712 return m_center.y + m_radius;
2713 }
2714
2715 protected:
2716
2717 double m_radius;
2718 wxPoint m_center;
2719 std::vector<wxColour> colours;
2720
2725 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
2726
2728 const wxColour& GetColour(unsigned int id);
2729
2730 private:
2731 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpBarChart);
2732};
2733
2736//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2737// mpLayer implementations - furniture (scales, ...)
2738//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2746class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpScale: public mpLayer
2747{
2748 public:
2756 mpScale(const wxString &name, int flags, bool grids, mpLabelType labelType = mpLabel_AUTO, mpOptional_uint axisID = MP_OPTNULL_INT);
2757
2761 virtual bool HasBBox()
2762 {
2763 return false;
2764 }
2765
2769 int GetAxisID(void)
2770 {
2771 return m_axisID;
2772 }
2773
2778 void SetAxisID(unsigned int yAxisID)
2779 {
2780 m_axisID = yAxisID;
2781 }
2782
2785 void ShowTicks(bool ticks)
2786 {
2787 m_ticks = ticks;
2788 }
2789
2792 bool GetShowTicks() const
2793 {
2794 return m_ticks;
2795 }
2796
2799 void ShowGrids(bool grids)
2800 {
2801 m_grids = grids;
2802 }
2803
2806 bool GetShowGrids() const
2807 {
2808 return m_grids;
2809 }
2810
2815 void SetLabelFormat(const wxString &format, bool updateLabelMode = false)
2816 {
2817 m_labelFormat = format;
2818 if (updateLabelMode)
2819 m_labelType = mpLabel_USER;
2820 }
2821
2824 mpLabelType GetLabelMode() const
2825 {
2826 return m_labelType;
2827 }
2828
2832 void SetLabelMode(mpLabelType mode, unsigned int time_conv = MP_X_RAWTIME)
2833 {
2834 m_labelType = mode;
2835 m_timeConv = time_conv;
2836 }
2837
2840 const wxString& GetLabelFormat() const
2841 {
2842 return m_labelFormat;
2843 }
2844
2848 void SetGridPen(const wxPen &pen)
2849 {
2850 m_gridpen = pen;
2851 }
2852
2856 const wxPen& GetGridPen() const
2857 {
2858 return m_gridpen;
2859 }
2860
2864 void SetAuto(bool automaticScalingIsEnabled)
2865 {
2866 m_auto = automaticScalingIsEnabled;
2867 }
2868
2872 bool GetAuto() const
2873 {
2874 return m_auto;
2875 }
2876
2880 void SetMinScale(double min)
2881 {
2882 m_axisRange.SetMin(min);
2883 }
2884
2888 double GetMinScale() const
2889 {
2890 return m_axisRange.min;
2891 }
2892
2896 void SetMaxScale(double max)
2897 {
2898 m_axisRange.SetMax(max);
2899 }
2900
2904 double GetMaxScale() const
2905 {
2906 return m_axisRange.max;
2907 }
2908
2913 void SetScale(double min, double max)
2914 {
2915 m_axisRange.Set(min, max);
2916 }
2917
2922 void GetScale(double *min, double *max) const
2923 {
2924 *min = m_axisRange.min;
2925 *max = m_axisRange.max;
2926 }
2927
2931 void SetScale(mpRange<double> range)
2932 {
2933 m_axisRange = range;
2934 }
2935
2939 mpRange<double> GetScale() const
2940 {
2941 return mpRange<double>(m_axisRange);
2942 }
2943
2947 void SetHovering(bool hover)
2948 {
2949 m_hover = hover;
2950 }
2951
2955 virtual bool IsLogAxis()
2956 {
2957 return m_isLog;
2958 }
2959
2963 virtual void SetLogAxis(bool log)
2964 {
2965 m_isLog = log;
2966 }
2967
2971 void SetCoordIsAlwaysVisible(bool alwaysVisible)
2972 {
2973 m_CoordIsAlwaysVisible = alwaysVisible;
2974 }
2975
2979 bool GetCoordIsAlwaysVisible() const
2980 {
2981 return m_CoordIsAlwaysVisible;
2982 }
2983
2984 protected:
2985 static const wxCoord kTickSize = 4;
2986 static const wxCoord kAxisExtraSpace = 6;
2987
2988 int m_axisID;
2989 wxPen m_gridpen;
2990 bool m_ticks;
2991 bool m_grids;
2992 bool m_auto;
2993 mpRange<double> m_axisRange;
2994 mpLabelType m_labelType;
2995 unsigned int m_timeConv;
2996 wxString m_labelFormat;
2997 bool m_isLog;
2998 bool m_hover = false;
2999 bool m_CoordIsAlwaysVisible;
3000
3003 virtual int GetOrigin(mpWindow &w) = 0;
3004
3011 double GetStep(double scale, int minLabelSpacing);
3012
3020 virtual void DrawScaleName(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w, int origin, int labelSize) = 0;
3021
3027 wxString FormatLabelValue(double value);
3028
3033 wxString FormatLogValue(double n);
3034
3041 int GetLabelWidth(double value, wxDC &dc);
3042
3047 bool UseScientific(double maxAxisValue);
3048
3054 int GetSignificantDigits(double step, double maxAxisValue);
3055
3060 int GetDecimalDigits(double step);
3061
3065 struct {
3066 double step;
3067 double maxAxisValue;
3068 bool UseScientific;
3069 int SignificantDigits;
3070 int DecimalDigits;
3071 double EpsilonScale;
3072 } m_ScaleConstraints;
3073
3077 void ComputeScaleConstraints(double step, double maxAxisValue);
3078
3079 private:
3080 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpScale);
3081};
3082
3083
3089class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpScaleX: public mpScale
3090{
3091 public:
3097 mpScaleX(const wxString &name = _T("X"), int flags = mpALIGN_CENTERX, bool grids = false, mpLabelType type = mpLabel_AUTO) :
3098 mpScale(name, flags, grids, type)
3099 {
3100 m_subtype = mpsScaleX;
3101 }
3102
3104 bool IsTopAxis()
3105 {
3106 return ((GetAlign() == mpALIGN_BORDER_TOP) || (GetAlign() == mpALIGN_TOP));
3107 }
3108
3110 bool IsBottomAxis()
3111 {
3112 return ((GetAlign() == mpALIGN_BORDER_BOTTOM) || (GetAlign() == mpALIGN_BOTTOM));
3113 }
3114
3115 protected:
3120 static int m_orgy;
3121
3124 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
3125
3126 virtual int GetOrigin(mpWindow &w);
3127 virtual void DrawScaleName(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w, int origin, int labelSize);
3128
3129 private:
3130 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpScaleX);
3131
3135 friend mpScaleY;
3136};
3137
3144class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpScaleY: public mpScale
3145{
3146 public:
3154 mpScaleY(const wxString &name = _T("Y"), int flags = mpALIGN_CENTERY, bool grids = false, mpOptional_uint yAxisID = MP_OPTNULL_INT, mpLabelType labelType = mpLabel_AUTO) :
3155 mpScale(name, flags, grids, labelType, yAxisID)
3156 {
3157 m_subtype = mpsScaleY;
3158 m_axisWidth = MP_Y_BORDER_SEPARATION;
3159 m_xPos = 0;
3160 }
3161
3164 void UpdateAxisWidth(mpWindow &w);
3165
3167 int GetAxisWidth()
3168 {
3169 return m_axisWidth;
3170 }
3171
3173 bool IsLeftAxis()
3174 {
3175 return ((GetAlign() == mpALIGN_BORDER_LEFT) || (GetAlign() == mpALIGN_LEFT));
3176 }
3177
3179 bool IsRightAxis()
3180 {
3181 return ((GetAlign() == mpALIGN_BORDER_RIGHT) || (GetAlign() == mpALIGN_RIGHT));
3182 }
3183
3185 bool IsInside(wxCoord xPixel)
3186 {
3187 if ( (IsLeftAxis() || IsRightAxis()) && (xPixel >= m_xPos) && (xPixel <= (m_xPos + m_axisWidth)) )
3188 {
3189 return true;
3190 }
3191 return false;
3192 }
3193
3194 protected:
3195 int m_axisWidth;
3196 int m_xPos;
3197
3200 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
3201
3202 virtual int GetOrigin(mpWindow &w);
3203 virtual void DrawScaleName(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w, int origin, int labelSize);
3204
3205 private:
3206 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpScaleY);
3207};
3208
3209//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
3210// mpWindow
3211//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
3212
3218#define mpMOUSEMODE_DRAG 0
3220#define mpMOUSEMODE_ZOOMBOX 1
3221
3224//WX_DECLARE_HASH_MAP( int, mpLayer*, wxIntegerHash, wxIntegerEqual, mpLayerList );
3225typedef std::deque<mpLayer*> mpLayerList;
3226
3236struct mpAxisData
3237{
3238 mpScale* axis = nullptr;
3239 double scale = 1.0;
3240 double pos = 0;
3241 mpRange<double> bound;
3242 mpRange<double> desired;
3243 mpRange<double> lastDesired;
3244
3245 // Note: we don't use the default operator since we don't want to compare axis pointers
3247 bool operator==(const mpAxisData& other) const
3248 {
3249 return /*(axis == other.axis) && */ (scale == other.scale) && (pos == other.pos) &&
3250 (bound == other.bound) && (desired == other.desired);
3251 }
3252};
3253
3255typedef std::map<int, mpAxisData> mpAxisList;
3256
3263typedef enum {
3264 uXAxis = 1,
3265 uYAxis = 2,
3266 uXYAxis = 3
3267} mpAxisUpdate;
3268
3278typedef std::function<void(void *Sender, const wxString &classname, bool &cancel)> mpOnDeleteLayer;
3279
3286typedef std::function<void(void *Sender, wxMouseEvent &event, bool &cancel)> mpOnUserMouseAction;
3287
3292class mpMagnet
3293{
3294 public:
3295 mpMagnet()
3296 {
3297 m_enable = false;
3298 m_show = false;
3299 }
3300 ~mpMagnet()
3301 {
3302 ;
3303 }
3304
3306 void UpdateBox(const wxRect &plotArea)
3307 {
3308 m_domain = plotArea;
3309 }
3310
3312 void Enable(bool enable)
3313 {
3314 m_enable = enable;
3315 }
3316
3318 bool IsEnabled() const
3319 {
3320 return m_enable;
3321 }
3322
3324 void DrawCross(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
3325
3327 bool ShouldBeShown(wxPoint mousePos)
3328 {
3329 return m_enable && m_domain.Contains(mousePos);
3330 }
3331
3333 void Show(bool show)
3334 {
3335 m_show = show;
3336 }
3337
3339 bool IsShown()
3340 {
3341 return m_show;
3342 }
3343
3344 private:
3345 bool m_enable;
3346 bool m_show;
3347 wxRect m_domain;
3348};
3349
3371class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpWindow: public wxWindow
3372{
3373 public:
3374 mpWindow()
3375 {
3376 InitParameters();
3377 }
3378
3386 mpWindow(wxWindow *parent, wxWindowID id = wxID_ANY, const wxPoint &pos = wxDefaultPosition, const wxSize &size = wxDefaultSize,
3387 long flags = 0);
3388
3389 ~mpWindow();
3390
3394 wxMenu* GetPopupMenu()
3395 {
3396 return &m_popmenu;
3397 }
3398
3407 bool AddLayer(mpLayer *layer, bool refreshDisplay = true, bool refreshConfig = true);
3408
3421 bool DelLayer(mpLayer *layer, mpDeleteAction alsoDeleteObject, bool refreshDisplay = true, bool refreshConfig = true);
3422
3428 void DelAllLayers(mpDeleteAction alsoDeleteObject, bool refreshDisplay = true);
3429
3436 void DelAllPlot(mpDeleteAction alsoDeleteObject, mpFunctionType func = mpfAllType, bool refreshDisplay = true);
3437
3444 void DelAllYAxisAfterID(mpDeleteAction alsoDeleteObject, int yAxisID = 0, bool refreshDisplay = true);
3445
3451 mpLayer* GetLayer(int position);
3452
3457 int GetLayerPosition(mpLayer* layer);
3458
3465 mpLayer* GetLayersType(int position, mpLayerType type);
3466
3473 mpLayer* GetLayerPlot(int position, mpFunctionType func = mpfAllType);
3474
3480 mpScale* GetLayerAxis(int position, mpScaleType scale = mpsAllType);
3481
3490 mpFXYVector* GetXYSeries(unsigned int n, const wxString &name = _T("Serie "), bool create = true);
3491
3500 mpLayer* GetClosestPlot(wxCoord ix, wxCoord iy, double *xnear, double *ynear);
3501
3506 mpLayer* GetLayerByName(const wxString &name);
3507
3512 mpLayer* GetLayerByClassName(const wxString &name);
3513
3517 void RefreshLegend(void);
3518
3523 bool IsYAxisUsed(int yAxisID);
3524
3530 bool IsYAxisUsedByFunction(int yAxisID, int *position);
3531
3535 mpScaleX* GetLayerXAxis();
3536
3540 mpScaleY* GetLayerYAxis(int yAxisID);
3541
3545 void SetScaleX(const double scaleX)
3546 {
3547 if (MP_ISNOTNULL(scaleX))
3548 {
3549 m_AxisDataX.scale = scaleX;
3550 UpdateDesiredBoundingBox(uXAxis);
3551 }
3552 UpdateAll();
3553 }
3554
3559 double GetScaleX(void) const
3560 {
3561 return m_AxisDataX.scale;
3562 }
3563
3568 void SetScaleY(const double scaleY, int yAxisID)
3569 {
3570 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
3571 if (MP_ISNOTNULL(scaleY))
3572 {
3573 m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].scale = scaleY;
3574 UpdateDesiredBoundingBox(uYAxis);
3575 }
3576 UpdateAll();
3577 }
3578
3584 double GetScaleY(int yAxisID)
3585 {
3586 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
3587 return m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].scale;
3588 } // Schaling's method: maybe another method exists with the same name
3589
3590 [[deprecated("Incomplete, use UpdateBBox instead")]]
3593 void SetBound();
3594
3596 mpRange<double> GetBoundX(void) const
3597 {
3598 return m_AxisDataX.bound;
3599 }
3600
3602 mpRange<double> GetDesiredBoundX(void) const
3603 {
3604 return m_AxisDataX.desired;
3605 }
3606
3610 mpRange<double> GetBoundY(int yAxisID)
3611 {
3612 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
3613 return m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].bound;
3614 }
3615
3619 mpRange<double> GetDesiredBoundY(int yAxisID)
3620 {
3621 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
3622 return m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].desired;
3623 }
3624
3629 std::unordered_map<int, mpRange<double>> GetAllBoundY()
3630 {
3631 std::unordered_map<int, mpRange<double>> yRange;
3632 for (const MP_LOOP_ITER : m_AxisDataYList)
3633 {
3634 yRange[m_yID] = m_yData.bound;
3635 }
3636 return yRange;
3637 }
3638
3643 std::unordered_map<int, mpRange<double>> GetAllDesiredY()
3644 {
3645 std::unordered_map<int, mpRange<double>> yRange;
3646 for (const MP_LOOP_ITER : m_AxisDataYList)
3647 {
3648 yRange[m_yID] = m_yData.desired;
3649 }
3650 return yRange;
3651 }
3652
3656 void SetPosX(const double posX)
3657 {
3658 m_AxisDataX.pos = posX;
3659 UpdateDesiredBoundingBox(uXAxis);
3660 UpdateAll();
3661 }
3662
3667 double GetPosX(void) const
3668 {
3669 return m_AxisDataX.pos;
3670 }
3671
3676 void SetPosY(std::unordered_map<int, double>& posYList)
3677 {
3678 for (MP_LOOP_ITER : m_AxisDataYList)
3679 {
3680 m_yData.pos = posYList[m_yID];
3681 }
3682 UpdateDesiredBoundingBox(uYAxis);
3683 UpdateAll();
3684 }
3685
3691 double GetPosY(int yAxisID)
3692 {
3693 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
3694 return m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].pos;
3695 }
3696
3700 int GetNOfYAxis(void) const
3701 {
3702 return (int)m_AxisDataYList.size();
3703 }
3704
3708 mpAxisList GetAxisDataYList(void) const
3709 {
3710 return m_AxisDataYList;
3711 }
3712
3718 void SetScreen(const int scrX, const int scrY)
3719 {
3720 m_scrX = scrX;
3721 m_scrY = scrY;
3722 m_plotWidth = m_scrX - (m_margin.left + m_margin.right);
3723 m_plotHeight = m_scrY - (m_margin.top + m_margin.bottom);
3724
3725 m_plotBoundaries.endPx = m_scrX;
3726 m_plotBoundariesMargin.endPx = m_scrX - m_margin.right;
3727 m_plotBoundaries.endPy = m_scrY;
3728 m_plotBoundariesMargin.endPy = m_scrY - m_margin.bottom;
3729
3730 m_PlotArea = wxRect(m_margin.left - m_extraMargin, m_margin.top - m_extraMargin,
3731 m_plotWidth + 2*m_extraMargin, m_plotHeight + 2*m_extraMargin);
3732
3733 m_magnet.UpdateBox(m_PlotArea);
3734 }
3735
3742 int GetScreenX(void) const
3743 {
3744 return m_scrX;
3745 }
3746
3753 int GetScreenY(void) const
3754 {
3755 return m_scrY;
3756 }
3757
3763 void SetPos(const double posX, std::unordered_map<int, double>& posYList)
3764 {
3765 m_AxisDataX.pos = posX;
3766 SetPosY(posYList);
3767 }
3768
3772 inline double p2x(const wxCoord pixelCoordX) const
3773 {
3774 return m_AxisDataX.pos + (pixelCoordX / m_AxisDataX.scale);
3775 }
3776
3780 inline double p2y(const wxCoord pixelCoordY, int yAxisID = 0)
3781 {
3782 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
3783 if (m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) == 0)
3784 return 0.0;
3785 return m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].pos - (pixelCoordY / m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].scale);
3786 }
3787
3791 inline wxCoord x2p(const double x) const
3792 {
3793 return (wxCoord)((x - m_AxisDataX.pos) * m_AxisDataX.scale);
3794 }
3795
3799 inline wxCoord y2p(const double y, int yAxisID = 0)
3800 {
3801 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
3802 if (m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) == 0)
3803 return 0;
3804 return (wxCoord)((m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].pos - y) * m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].scale);
3805 }
3806
3808 [[deprecated("Deprecated - use EnableBufferedPaintDC??")]]
3809 void EnableDoubleBuffer(const bool enabled)
3810 {
3811 EnableBufferedPaintDC(enabled);
3812 };
3813
3816 void EnableBufferedPaintDC(const bool enabled)
3817 {
3818 m_enableBufferedPaintDC = enabled;
3819 }
3820
3823 void EnableMousePanZoom(const bool enabled)
3824 {
3825 m_enableMouseNavigation = enabled;
3826 }
3827
3833 void LockAspect(bool enable = true);
3834
3839 inline bool IsAspectLocked() const
3840 {
3841 return m_lockaspect;
3842 }
3843
3848 void Fit();
3849
3856 void Fit(const mpRange<double> &rangeX, std::unordered_map<int, mpRange<double>> rangeY, wxCoord *printSizeX = NULL, wxCoord *printSizeY = NULL);
3857
3861 void FitX(void);
3862
3867 void FitY(int yAxisID);
3868
3873 void ZoomIn(const wxPoint &centerPoint = wxDefaultPosition);
3874
3879 void ZoomOut(const wxPoint &centerPoint = wxDefaultPosition);
3880
3882 void ZoomInX();
3883
3885 void ZoomOutX();
3886
3889 void ZoomInY(mpOptional_int yAxisID = MP_OPTNULL_INT);
3890
3893 void ZoomOutY(mpOptional_int yAxisID = MP_OPTNULL_INT);
3894
3899 void ZoomRect(wxPoint p0, wxPoint p1);
3900
3902 void UpdateAll();
3903
3904 // Added methods by Davide Rondini
3905
3909 unsigned int CountLayers();
3910
3913 unsigned int CountAllLayers()
3914 {
3915 return (unsigned int)m_layers.size();
3916 }
3917
3921 unsigned int CountLayersType(mpLayerType type);
3922
3926 unsigned int CountLayersFXYPlot();
3927
3934 void UpdateDesiredBoundingBox(mpAxisUpdate update)
3935 {
3936 // Change on X axis
3937 if (update & uXAxis)
3938 {
3939 m_AxisDataX.desired.Set(m_AxisDataX.pos + (m_margin.left / m_AxisDataX.scale),
3940 m_AxisDataX.pos + ((m_margin.left + m_plotWidth) / m_AxisDataX.scale));
3941 }
3942
3943 // Change on Y axis
3944 if (update & uYAxis)
3945 {
3946 for (MP_LOOP_ITER : m_AxisDataYList)
3947 {
3948 m_yData.desired.Set(m_yData.pos - ((m_margin.top + m_plotHeight) / m_yData.scale),
3949 m_yData.pos - (m_margin.top / m_yData.scale));
3950 }
3951 }
3952 }
3953
3959 mpFloatRectSimple GetBoundingBox(bool desired, unsigned int yAxisID = 0)
3960 {
3961 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
3962 if (desired)
3963 return mpFloatRectSimple(m_AxisDataX.desired, m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].desired);
3964 else
3965 return mpFloatRectSimple(m_AxisDataX.bound, m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].bound);
3966 }
3967
3971 double GetDesiredXmin() const
3972 {
3973 return m_AxisDataX.desired.min;
3974 }
3975
3980 double GetDesiredXmax() const
3981 {
3982 return m_AxisDataX.desired.max;
3983 }
3984
3990 double GetDesiredYmin(int yAxisID)
3991 {
3992 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
3993 return m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].desired.min;
3994 }
3995
4001 double GetDesiredYmax(int yAxisID)
4002 {
4003 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
4004 return m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].desired.max;
4005 }
4006
4012 bool GetBoundingBox(mpRange<double> *boundX, mpRange<double> *boundY, int yAxisID)
4013 {
4014 if (m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) == 0)
4015 return false;
4016 *boundX = m_AxisDataX.bound;
4017 *boundY = m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].bound;
4018 return true;
4019 }
4020
4026 bool PointIsInsideBound(double px, double py, int yAxisID)
4027 {
4028 if (m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) == 0)
4029 return false;
4030
4031 return m_AxisDataX.bound.PointIsInside(px) && GetBoundY(yAxisID).PointIsInside(py);
4032 }
4033
4039 void UpdateBoundingBoxToInclude(double px, double py, int yAxisID)
4040 {
4041 if (m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) == 0)
4042 return ;
4043
4044 m_AxisDataX.bound.Update(px);
4045 m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].bound.Update(py);
4046 }
4047
4048 /* Initialize bounding box with an initial point
4049 * @param px point on x-axis
4050 * @param py point on y-axis
4051 * @param yAxisID the y-axis ID
4052 */
4054 void InitializeBoundingBox(double px, double py, int yAxisID)
4055 {
4056 if (m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) == 0)
4057 return ;
4058
4059 m_AxisDataX.bound.Set(px, px);
4060 m_AxisDataYList[yAxisID].bound.Set(py, py);
4061 }
4062
4065 void SetMPScrollbars(bool status);
4066
4069 bool GetMPScrollbars() const
4070 {
4071 return m_enableScrollBars;
4072 }

4096 m_wildcard = wildcard;

4102 const wxString& GetWildcard(void) const
4103 {
4104 return m_wildcard;
4105 }

4114 bool LoadFile(const wxString &filename = wxEmptyString);
4115
4120 void SetDefaultDir(const wxString &dirname)
4121 {
4122 m_DefaultDir = dirname;
4123 }

4127 static double m_zoomIncrementalFactor;
4128
4132 static bool m_DefaultLegendIsAlwaysVisible;
4133
4139 void SetDefaultLegendIsAlwaysVisible(bool visible)
4140 {
4141 m_DefaultLegendIsAlwaysVisible = visible;
4142 }
4143
4147 static bool m_DefaultCoordIsAlwaysVisible;
4148
4149
4154 void SetAutoFit(bool autoFit)
4155 {
4156 m_autoFit = autoFit;
4157 }
4158
4165 void SetMargins(int top, int right, int bottom, int left);
4166
4168 void UpdateMargins()
4169 {
4170 SetMargins(m_marginOuter.top, m_marginOuter.right, m_marginOuter.bottom, m_marginOuter.left);
4171 }
4172
4174 void SetMarginTop(int top)
4175 {
4176 SetMargins(top, m_marginOuter.right, m_marginOuter.bottom, m_marginOuter.left);
4177 }
4178
4182 int GetMarginTop(bool minusExtra = false) const
4183 {
4184 if (minusExtra)
4185 return m_margin.top - m_extraMargin;
4186 else
4187 return m_margin.top;
4188 }
4189
4191 void SetMarginRight(int right)
4192 {
4193 SetMargins(m_marginOuter.top, right, m_marginOuter.bottom, m_marginOuter.left);
4194 }
4195
4199 int GetMarginRight(bool minusExtra = false) const
4200 {
4201 if (minusExtra)
4202 return m_margin.right - m_extraMargin;
4203 else
4204 return m_margin.right;
4205 }
4206
4208 int GetMarginRightOuter() const
4209 {
4210 return m_marginOuter.right;
4211 }
4212
4214 void SetMarginBottom(int bottom)
4215 {
4216 SetMargins(m_marginOuter.top, m_marginOuter.right, bottom, m_marginOuter.left);
4217 }
4218
4222 int GetMarginBottom(bool minusExtra = false) const
4223 {
4224 if (minusExtra)
4225 return m_margin.bottom - m_extraMargin;
4226 else
4227 return m_margin.bottom;
4228 }
4229
4231 void SetMarginLeft(int left)
4232 {
4233 SetMargins(m_marginOuter.top, m_marginOuter.right, m_marginOuter.bottom, left);
4234 }
4235
4239 int GetMarginLeft(bool minusExtra = false) const
4240 {
4241 if (minusExtra)
4242 return m_margin.left - m_extraMargin;
4243 else
4244 return m_margin.left;
4245 }
4246
4248 void SetExtraMargin(int extra)
4249 {
4250 m_extraMargin = extra;
4251 SetMargins(m_marginOuter.top, m_marginOuter.right, m_marginOuter.bottom, m_marginOuter.left);
4252 }
4253
4255 int GetExtraMargin() const
4256 {
4257 return m_extraMargin;
4258 }
4259
4261 int GetMarginLeftOuter() const
4262 {
4263 return m_marginOuter.left;
4264 }
4265
4267 int GetPlotWidth() const
4268 {
4269 return m_plotWidth;
4270 }
4271
4273 int GetPlotHeight() const
4274 {
4275 return m_plotHeight;
4276 }
4277
4282 mpRect GetPlotBoundaries(bool with_margin) const
4283 {
4284 mpRect bond;
4285 if (with_margin)
4286 bond = m_plotBoundariesMargin;
4287 else
4288 bond = m_plotBoundaries;
4289 bond.startPx -= m_extraMargin;
4290 bond.endPx += m_extraMargin;
4291 bond.startPy -= m_extraMargin;
4292 bond.endPy += m_extraMargin;
4293 return bond;
4294 }
4295
4299 int GetLeftYAxesWidth(mpOptional_int yAxisID = MP_OPTNULL_INT);
4300
4304 int GetRightYAxesWidth(mpOptional_int yAxisID = MP_OPTNULL_INT);
4305
4307 void SetDrawBox(bool drawbox)
4308 {
4309 m_drawBox = drawbox;
4310 }
4311
4313 bool GetDrawBox() const
4314 {
4315 return m_drawBox;
4316 }

4321 mpOptional_int IsInsideYAxis(const wxPoint &point);
4322
4326 mpInfoLayer* IsInsideInfoLayer(const wxPoint &point);

4331 void SetLayerVisible(const wxString &name, bool viewable);

4336 bool IsLayerVisible(const wxString &name);
4337
4341 bool IsLayerVisible(const unsigned int position);
4342
4346 void SetLayerVisible(const unsigned int position, bool viewable);
4347
4352 void SetColourTheme(const wxColour &bgColour, const wxColour &drawColour, const wxColour &axesColour);

4357 {
4358 return m_axColour;
4359 }
4360
4362 const wxColour& GetbgColour() const
4363 {
4364 return m_bgColour;
4365 }
4366
4368 void SetbgColour(const wxColour &colour)
4369 {
4370 m_bgColour = colour;
4371 }
4372
4378 void SetOnDeleteLayer(const mpOnDeleteLayer &event)
4379 {
4380 m_OnDeleteLayer = event;
4381 }
4382
4384 void UnSetOnDeleteLayer()
4385 {
4386 m_OnDeleteLayer = NULL;
4387 }
4388
4393 void SetOnUserMouseAction(const mpOnUserMouseAction &userMouseEventHandler)
4394 {
4395 m_OnUserMouseAction = userMouseEventHandler;
4396 }
4397
4399 void UnSetOnUserMouseAction()
4400 {
4401 m_OnUserMouseAction = NULL;
4402 }
4403
4409 bool IsLogXaxis()
4410 {
4411 if (m_AxisDataX.axis)
4412 return ((mpScaleX *)m_AxisDataX.axis)->IsLogAxis();
4413 else
4414 return false;
4415 }
4416
4421 bool IsLogYaxis(int yAxisID)
4422 {
4423 assert(m_AxisDataYList.count(yAxisID) != 0);
4424 mpScaleY* yAxis = GetLayerYAxis(yAxisID);
4425 if (yAxis)
4426 return yAxis->IsLogAxis();
4427 else
4428 return false;
4429 }
4430
4435 void SetLogXaxis(bool log)
4436 {
4437 if (m_AxisDataX.axis)
4438 ((mpScaleX *)m_AxisDataX.axis)->SetLogAxis(log);
4439 }
4440
4446 void SetLogYaxis(int yAxisID, bool log)
4447 {
4448 mpScaleY* yAxis = GetLayerYAxis(yAxisID);
4449 if (yAxis)
4450 yAxis->SetLogAxis(log);
4451 }
4452
4457 bool GetMagnetize() const
4458 {
4459 return m_magnet.IsEnabled();
4460 }
4461
4463 void SetMagnetize(bool mag)
4464 {
4465 m_magnet.Enable(mag);
4466 }
4467
4472 void SetMouseLeftDownAction(mpMouseButtonAction action)
4473 {
4474 m_mouseLeftDownAction = action;
4475 }
4476
4481 mpMouseButtonAction GetMouseLeftDownAction()
4482 {
4483 return m_mouseLeftDownAction;
4484 }
4485
4490 wxPoint GetMousePosition()
4491 {
4492 return m_mousePos;
4493 }
4494
4499 mpInfoLayer* GetMovingInfoLayer()
4500 {
4501 return m_movingInfoLayer;
4502 }
4503
4504#if defined(MP_ENABLE_CONFIG) || defined(ENABLE_MP_CONFIG)
4509 MathPlotConfigDialog* GetConfigWindow(bool Create = false);
4510#endif // MP_ENABLE_CONFIG
4511
4518 void RefreshConfigWindow(mpLayerType layerType, int param = 0, bool show = false);
4519
4523 void OpenConfigWindow();
4524
4528 void DeleteConfigWindow(void);
4529
4534 void Paint(wxDC& dc);
4535
4540 void RenderOverlays(wxDC& dc);
4541
4547 wxMemoryDC *GetMemoryDC(void)
4548 {
4549 m_buff_dc.SelectObject(m_buff_bmp);
4550 return &m_buff_dc;

4553 protected:
4554 virtual void BindEvents(void);
4555 virtual void OnPaint(wxPaintEvent &event);
4556 virtual void OnSize(wxSizeEvent &event);
4557 virtual void OnShowPopupMenu(wxMouseEvent &event);
4558 virtual void OnCenter(wxCommandEvent &event);

4603

4609

4616
4621 void Zoom(bool zoomIn, const wxPoint &centerPoint);

4670 bool m_cacheDirty;

4682 bool m_autoFit;

4702 mpOnDeleteLayer m_OnDeleteLayer = NULL;
4703 mpOnUserMouseAction m_OnUserMouseAction = NULL;
4704
4708 virtual void DesiredBoundsHaveChanged() {};
4709
4710 private:
4712 void CheckAndReportDesiredBoundsChanges();
4713
4718 unsigned int GetNewAxisDataID(void)
4719 {
4720 int newID = 0;
4721 for (const MP_LOOP_ITER : m_AxisDataYList)
4722 {
4723 if(m_yData.axis)
4724 {
4725 // This ID is used by an axis. Make sure the new ID is larger
4726 newID = std::max(newID, m_yID + 1);
4727 }
4728 }
4729 return newID;
4730 }
4731
4732 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpWindow);
4733
4734 // To have direct access to m_Screenshot_dc
4735 friend mpPrintout;
4736};
4737
4738//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4739// mpText - provided by Val Greene
4740//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4741
4749class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpText: public mpLayer
4750{
4751 public:
4754 mpText(const wxString &name = wxEmptyString) : mpLayer(mpLAYER_TEXT)
4755 {
4756 m_subtype = mptText;
4757 SetName(name);
4758 m_offsetx = 5;
4759 m_offsety = 50;
4760 m_location = mpMarginUser;
4761 m_ZIndex = mpZIndex_TEXT;
4762 }
4763
4767 mpText(const wxString &name, int offsetx, int offsety);
4768
4772 mpText(const wxString &name, mpLocation marginLocation);
4773
4776 virtual bool HasBBox()
4777 {
4778 return false;
4779 }
4780
4783 void SetLocation(mpLocation location)
4784 {
4785 m_location = location;
4786 }
4787
4790 mpLocation GetLocation() const
4791 {
4792 return m_location;
4793 }
4794
4797 void SetOffset(int offX, int offY)
4798 {
4799 m_offsetx = offX;
4800 m_offsety = offY;
4801 }
4802
4804 void GetOffset(int *offX, int *offY) const
4805 {
4806 *offX = m_offsetx;
4807 *offY = m_offsety;
4808 }
4809
4810 protected:
4811 int m_offsetx;
4812 int m_offsety;
4813 mpLocation m_location;
4814
4817 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
4818
4819 private:
4820 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpText);
4821};
4822
4826class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpTitle: public mpText
4827{
4828 public:
4831 mpTitle();
4832
4835 mpTitle(const wxString &name) :
4836 mpText(name, mpMarginTopCenter)
4837 {
4838 m_subtype = mptTitle;
4839 SetPen(*wxWHITE_PEN);
4840 SetBrush(*wxWHITE_BRUSH);
4841 }
4842
4843 private:
4844 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpTitle);
4845};

4847//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4848// mpPrintout - provided by Davide Rondini
4849//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4850
4855class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpPrintout: public wxPrintout
4856{
4857 public:
4858 mpPrintout()
4859 {
4860 plotWindow = NULL;
4861 drawn = false;
4862 stretch_factor = 2;
4863 }
4864
4870 mpPrintout(mpWindow *drawWindow, const wxString &title = _T("wxMathPlot print output"), int factor = 2);
4871 virtual ~mpPrintout()
4872 {
4873 ;
4874 }
4875
4879 void SetDrawState(bool drawState)
4880 {
4881 drawn = drawState;
4882 }
4883
4885 bool OnPrintPage(int page);
4887 bool HasPage(int page);
4888
4891 void SetFactor(int factor)
4892 {
4893 stretch_factor = factor;
4894 }
4895
4896 private:
4897 bool drawn;
4898 mpWindow* plotWindow;
4899 int stretch_factor; // To reduce the size of plot
4900
4901 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpPrintout);
4902};
4903
4904//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4905// mpMovableObject - provided by Jose Luis Blanco
4906//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4914class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpMovableObject: public mpFunction
4915{
4916 public:
4919 mpMovableObject() :
4920 m_reference_x(0), m_reference_y(0), m_reference_phi(0), m_shape_xs(0), m_shape_ys(0)
4921 {
4922 assert(m_type == mpLAYER_PLOT); // m_type is already set to mpLAYER_PLOT in default-arg mpFunction ctor: m_type = mpLAYER_PLOT;
4923 m_subtype = mpfMovable;
4924 }
4925
4926 virtual ~mpMovableObject() {}
4927
4930 void GetCoordinateBase(double &x, double &y, double &phi) const
4931 {
4932 x = m_reference_x;
4933 y = m_reference_y;
4934 phi = m_reference_phi;
4935 }
4936
4939 void SetCoordinateBase(double x, double y, double phi = 0)
4940 {
4941 m_reference_x = x;
4942 m_reference_y = y;
4943 m_reference_phi = phi;
4944 m_flags = mpALIGN_SW;
4945 ShapeUpdated();
4946 }
4947
4948 virtual bool HasBBox()
4949 {
4950 return m_trans_shape_xs.size() != 0;
4951 }
4952
4955 virtual double GetMinX()
4956 {
4957 return m_bbox_x.min;
4958 }
4959
4962 virtual double GetMaxX()
4963 {
4964 return m_bbox_x.max;
4965 }
4966
4969 virtual double GetMinY()
4970 {
4971 return m_bbox_y.min;
4972 }
4973
4976 virtual double GetMaxY()
4977 {
4978 return m_bbox_y.max;
4979 }
4980
4981 protected:
4982
4985 double m_reference_x;
4986 double m_reference_y;
4987 double m_reference_phi;
4988
4989 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
4990
4993 void TranslatePoint(double x, double y, double &out_x, double &out_y) const;
4994
4995 // the object points, in local coordinates (to be transformed by the current transformation).
4996 std::vector<double> m_shape_xs;
4997 std::vector<double> m_shape_ys;
4998
4999 // The buffer for the translated & rotated points (to avoid recomputing them with each mpWindow refresh).
5000 std::vector<double> m_trans_shape_xs;
5001 std::vector<double> m_trans_shape_ys;
5002
5006 mpRange<double> m_bbox_x;
5007 mpRange<double> m_bbox_y;
5008
5012 void ShapeUpdated();
5013
5014 private:
5015 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpMovableObject);
5016};
5017
5018//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
5019// mpCovarianceEllipse - provided by Jose Luis Blanco
5020//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
5032class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpCovarianceEllipse: public mpMovableObject
5033{
5034 public:
5038 mpCovarianceEllipse(double cov_00 = 1, double cov_11 = 1, double cov_01 = 0, double quantiles = 2, int segments = 32,
5039 const wxString &layerName = _T("")) : mpMovableObject(),
5040 m_cov_00(cov_00), m_cov_11(cov_11), m_cov_01(cov_01), m_quantiles(quantiles), m_segments(segments)
5041 {
5042 m_continuous = true;
5043 m_name = layerName;
5044 RecalculateShape();
5045 }
5046
5047 virtual ~mpCovarianceEllipse()
5048 {
5049 ;
5050 }
5051
5054 double GetQuantiles() const
5055 {
5056 return m_quantiles;
5057 }
5058
5061 void SetQuantiles(double q)
5062 {
5063 m_quantiles = q;
5064 RecalculateShape();
5065 }
5066
5068 void SetSegments(int segments)
5069 {
5070 m_segments = segments;
5071 }
5072
5074 int GetSegments() const
5075 {
5076 return m_segments;
5077 }
5078
5081 void GetCovarianceMatrix(double &cov_00, double &cov_01, double &cov_11) const
5082 {
5083 cov_00 = m_cov_00;
5084 cov_01 = m_cov_01;
5085 cov_11 = m_cov_11;
5086 }
5087
5090 void SetCovarianceMatrix(double cov_00, double cov_01, double cov_11)
5091 {
5092 m_cov_00 = cov_00;
5093 m_cov_01 = cov_01;
5094 m_cov_11 = cov_11;
5095 RecalculateShape();
5096 }
5097
5098 protected:
5101 double m_cov_00;
5102 double m_cov_11;
5103 double m_cov_01;
5104 double m_quantiles;
5105
5108 int m_segments;
5109
5112 void RecalculateShape();
5113
5114 private:
5115 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpCovarianceEllipse);
5116};
5117

5152//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
5153// mpBitmapLayer - provided by Jose Luis Blanco
5154//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
5159class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT mpBitmapLayer: public mpLayer
5160{
5161 public:
5164 mpBitmapLayer() : mpLayer(mpLAYER_BITMAP)
5165 {
5166 m_validImg = false;
5167 m_bitmapChanged = false;
5168 m_scaledBitmap_offset_x = m_scaledBitmap_offset_y = 0;
5169 }
5170
5171 virtual ~mpBitmapLayer()
5172 {
5173 ;
5174 }
5175
5178 void GetBitmapCopy(wxImage &outBmp) const;
5179
5187 void SetBitmap(const wxImage &inBmp, double x, double y, double lx, double ly);
5188
5191 virtual double GetMinX()
5192 {
5193 return m_bitmapX.min;
5194 }
5195
5198 virtual double GetMaxX()
5199 {
5200 return m_bitmapX.max;
5201 }
5202
5205 virtual double GetMinY()
5206 {
5207 return m_bitmapY.min;
5208 }
5209
5212 virtual double GetMaxY()
5213 {
5214 return m_bitmapY.max;
5215 }
5216
5217 protected:
5218
5221 wxImage m_bitmap;
5222 wxBitmap m_scaledBitmap;
5223 wxCoord m_scaledBitmap_offset_x;
5224 wxCoord m_scaledBitmap_offset_y;
5225 bool m_validImg;
5226 bool m_bitmapChanged;
5227
5230 mpRange<double> m_bitmapX;
5231 mpRange<double> m_bitmapY;
5232
5233 virtual void DoPlot(wxDC &dc, mpWindow &w);
5234
5235 private:
5236 DECLARE_DYNAMIC_CLASS_MATHPLOT(mpBitmapLayer);
5237};
5238
5239// utility class
5240
5242typedef enum __mp_Colour
5243{
5244 mpBlue,
5245 mpRed,
5246 mpGreen,
5247 mpPurple,
5248 mpYellow,
5249 mpFuchsia,
5250 mpLime,
5251 mpAqua,
5252 mpOlive
5253} mpColour;
5254
5259class WXDLLIMPEXP_MATHPLOT wxIndexColour: public wxColour
5260{
5261 public:
5266 wxIndexColour(unsigned int id)
5267 {
5268 switch (id)
5269 {
5270 case 0:
5271 this->Set(0, 0, 255);
5272 break; // Blue
5273 case 1:
5274 this->Set(255, 0, 0);
5275 break; // Red
5276 case 2:
5277 this->Set(0, 128, 0);
5278 break; // Green
5279 case 3:
5280 this->Set(128, 0, 128);
5281 break; // Purple
5282 case 4:
5283 this->Set(255, 255, 0);
5284 break; // Yellow
5285 case 5:
5286 this->Set(255, 0, 255);
5287 break; // Fuchsia
5288 case 6:
5289 this->Set(0, 255, 0);
5290 break; // Lime
5291 case 7:
5292 this->Set(0, 255, 255);
5293 break; // Aqua/Cyan
5294 case 8:
5295 this->Set(128, 128, 0);
5296 break; // Olive
5297 default:
5298 this->Set((ChannelType)((rand() * 255) / RAND_MAX), (ChannelType)((rand() * 255) / RAND_MAX),
5299 (ChannelType)((rand() * 255) / RAND_MAX));
5300 }
5301 }
5302};
5303

5307#if defined(MP_ENABLE_NAMESPACE) || defined(ENABLE_MP_NAMESPACE)
5308 }// namespace MathPlot
5309#endif // MP_ENABLE_NAMESPACE
